title: Treasury Manager (Transportation)
description:
• Globally recognised leader in the marine industry
  • Clear career progression pathways

About Our Client

Our client is a global provider of marine transportation services. Amid continued business growth, the organisation is seeking a collaborative and experienced finance professional to support and strengthen its expanding finance and treasury function.

Job Description

  • Support daily cash and liquidity management to ensure smooth business operations
  • Oversee payment processes, including vendor payments and operational disbursements
  • Assist with cash flow forecasting (short‑ and medium‑term) to support funding decisions
  • Liaise with banks and financial institutions on routine banking matters
  • Support accounts payable activities with a focus on control, accuracy, and timely execution
  • Assist in monitoring debt facilities and banking documentation
  • Maintain strong internal controls and support audit requirements
  • Work closely with accounting, operations, and management teams on finance‑related matters

The Successful Applicant

  • Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline
  • 5-8+ years of experience in accounting, treasury, or finance roles
  • Prior exposure to marine, offshore, shipping, oil & gas, or asset‑heavy industries is highly advantageous
  • Strong understanding of cash flow, payments, and financial controls
  • Detail‑oriented with a hands‑on and proactive mindset
  • Comfortable operating in a fast‑paced and operationally driven environment
  • Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively across teams

What's on Offer

  • Competitive salary and benefits package
  • Hands‑on exposure to treasury and cash management in a global business
  • Strong learning and development opportunities with career growth potential
  • High visibility role with close interaction with senior finance leadership

Contact
